title: An act relative to combined sewer overflows

abstracts.abstract: Senate, July 9, 2026 -- The committee on Environment and Natural Resources, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 606) of Barry R. Finegold for legislation relative to further testing after a combined sewage overflow event; and (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 608) of Patricia D. Jehlen relative to combined sewer overflows, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 3154).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Environment and Natural Resources
New draft of S606 and S608
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means
